channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: The New Containment Doctrine: How the United States Is Using Trade to Stop Digital Regulation
item.description: Moon Nguyen and Philip Luck examine how the United States is using trade negotiation to stop digital market regulations.

item.title: The Iran Conflict Is Sending Oil Prices Soaring—What Happens Next?
item.description: For oil and gas markets, there is no substitute for resuming exports from the Mideast Gulf. Without this, we’re heading for recession and painful inflation.
